prompt_summary: Based on the storyboard of a rainy night reunion at a hospital entrance, generate 2 cinematic realistic AI drawing prompts. Keep character consistency, rainy night atmosphere, cold car light, and tense reunion mood across two shots.

items.source_visual_description: Lin Wan stands at the hospital entrance steps holding a black umbrella, rain wetting the ground.
items.positive_prompt: cinematic realistic vertical frame, rainy night at a hospital entrance, young woman holding a black umbrella standing on the steps, rain wetting the pavement, wet reflections, cold blue ambient light, medium shot, eye-level angle, detailed face, black umbrella, tense mood, dramatic lighting, realistic skin texture
items.negative_prompt: low quality, blurry, bad anatomy, extra fingers, distorted face, watermark, text, logo, overexposed, duplicate people, sunny, daytime
items.camera_language: medium shot, eye-level angle, woman centered with umbrella framing her face
items.lighting: cold blue ambient light from rainy night, wet ground reflections, no direct warm light source
items.color_palette: blue-gray cold tones, dark umbrella silhouette, wet pavement with subtle reflections
items.character_consistency: Lin Wan, young woman, black umbrella, restrained expression, dark clothing consistent across shots
items.environment: hospital entrance, steps, glass doors, wet pavement, rainy night
items.composition: vertical frame, woman positioned slightly off-center left, umbrella fills upper right, rain streaks visible in foreground
items.model_hint: general image model, prioritize realistic cinematic details, clean human anatomy, wet surface reflections
items.notes: Ensure rain is visible but not obscuring the character's face. Keep hospital entrance recognizable.

items.source_visual_description: Gu Chen steps out of a black car, the two characters stare at each other through car headlights and rain.
items.positive_prompt: cinematic realistic vertical frame, rainy night, young man stepping out of a black sedan at hospital entrance, cold car headlights illuminating rain and wet ground, young woman in background holding black umbrella on steps, the two characters staring at each other through rain, tense reunion mood, medium wide shot, eye-level angle, detailed faces, dark car, wet reflections, dramatic contrast lighting
items.negative_prompt: low quality, blurry, bad anatomy, extra fingers, distorted face, watermark, text, logo, overexposed, duplicate people, sunny, daytime
items.camera_language: medium wide shot, eye-level angle, both characters visible, car headlights create visual separation
items.lighting: cold car headlights cutting through rain, wet ground reflections, dark silhouette of car and man, woman lit by ambient light
items.color_palette: blue-gray cold tones with sharp white headlight beams, dark car body, wet pavement reflections, subtle warm tones from distant streetlights
items.character_consistency: Gu Chen, young man, dark coat, stepping out of black sedan; Lin Wan, young woman, black umbrella, same appearance as shot 1
items.environment: hospital entrance, black sedan parked at curb, steps, glass doors, rainy night, wet pavement
items.composition: vertical frame, Gu Chen on lower left stepping out of car, Lin Wan on upper right on steps, headlights create diagonal light beam separating them visually
items.model_hint: general image model, prioritize realistic cinematic details, clean human anatomy, car headlight glow and rain interaction
items.notes: Maintain visual continuity of both characters from shot 1. Ensure car headlights are not overexposed. Keep rain visible but not obscuring faces.
